summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for SnapRoad Figma UI Design System integration. All 14 features tested successfully - Welcome screen, Login/SignUp navigation, Profile menu, Fuel Dashboard, Trip Logs, Leaderboard, Settings, Family flow, Live Locations, Admin Portal with dashboard and users page, Theme toggle (dark/light), and responsive design across mobile (430px), tablet (1024px), and desktop (1920px) viewports.

issues: Console warning: Recharts chart width/height warning - 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. Charts render correctly but may need minWidth/minHeight props to prevent console warnings.

action_items: Minor: Add minWidth/minHeight props to Recharts components in AdminDashboard.tsx and FuelDashboard.tsx to prevent console warnings
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for testing
Navigation flows work seamlessly between screens
Theme toggle (dark/light mode) works correctly with localStorage persistence
Responsive design implemented properly for all viewport sizes
Bottom navigation tab switching works correctly across all 4 tabs
Admin portal authentication and navigation working as expected
seed_data_creation: None - All data is MOCKED in components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Figma UI Design System successfully integrated. All screens render correctly at /app route. Key test IDs: welcome-get-started-btn, welcome-login-btn, welcome-admin-portal-btn, bottom-nav-profile, profile-menu-fuel-dashboard, admin-nav-users, theme-toggle. Theme context works with localStorage. ALL DATA IS MOCKED - no backend API integration for this design system.
mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IN FIGMA UI COMPONENTS IS MOCKED - User data, Trip data, Leaderboard data, Admin stats are all hardcoded/mocked within the components. No real backend API integration.

features_tested.welcome_screen: PASS - Renders with Get Started, Login, Partner Portal, Admin Portal buttons
features_tested.login_navigation: PASS - Navigate from Welcome to Login with User/Partner/Admin type selectors
features_tested.signup_navigation: PASS - Navigate from Welcome to SignUp with Create Account form
features_tested.profile_navigation: PASS - Bottom nav to Profile with menu items
features_tested.fuel_dashboard: PASS - Accessible from Profile menu, charts render
features_tested.trip_logs: PASS - Accessible from Profile menu, trip history displays
features_tested.leaderboard: PASS - Accessible from Profile menu, rankings shown
features_tested.settings: PASS - Accessible from Profile, theme toggle works
features_tested.live_locations: PASS - Accessible from Family flow, family member tracking
features_tested.admin_portal: PASS - Login and dashboard accessible from Welcome
features_tested.admin_dashboard: PASS - Stats cards and charts render
features_tested.admin_users: PASS - User table with search renders
features_tested.responsive_desktop_1920px: PASS - Admin panel with full sidebar
